findings.description: The source specifies that the generated object implements the `nablarch.fw.Request` interface: "nablarch.fw.Request インターフェースを実装した nablarch.fw.messaging.RequestMessage オブジェクトを生成して返す". The knowledge file omits the interface type, saying only that a RequestMessage object is generated. This type hierarchy information is relevant when working with the handler framework.
findings.source_evidence: ``nablarch.fw.Request`` インターフェースを実装した ``nablarch.fw.messaging.RequestMessage`` オブジェクトを生成して返す。

findings.description: `DataReader` is a PascalCase class name that appears in the section content (property table: `DataReader<ReceivedMessage>`) and in the Java code example (`DataReader<RequestMessage> reader = ...`), but is absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: DataReader<ReceivedMessage> (設定項目一覧 / messageReader行) and DataReader<RequestMessage> reader = new FwHeaderReader() (使用例)
